name: AI Global Neutral Governance
rational: Neutral assessment of worldwide AI system reachability, compliance, and governance maturity. No preference for any legal framework.
controls: Include all AI systems regardless of jurisdiction
Apply all available analysis and measurement profiles
Report on compliance with major frameworks (EU AI Act, Basic Act on AI, China PIPL, US EO)
requirements: Must measure API and web entry points
Must respect legal constraints (robots.txt, rate limits)
Must classify conflictClass according to access_type
